title: Social Media Banned
description: The government banned 26 apps including YouTube, Facebook, and WhatsApp — sparking national outrage.

title: Gen Z Takes to the Streets
description: Hundreds of thousands of young Nepalis protested against corruption, youth unemployment, and the social media ban.

title: Government Falls
description: Under massive public pressure, PM KP Sharma Oli's coalition government collapsed.

title: Parliament Dissolved, Snap Election Called
description: The President dissolved the House of Representatives and announced fresh elections within 6 months.

title: Nepal's First Female PM
description: Former Chief Justice Sushila Karki was appointed interim Prime Minister — Nepal's first ever female head of government.

title: Balen Shah Joins RSP
description: Popular Kathmandu Mayor and ex-rapper Balen Shah officially joined RSP as their candidate for Prime Minister.

title: Election Day
description: About 11.3 million Nepalis voted across 165 constituencies in a peaceful and historic election.

title: RSP Wins Historic Majority
description: RSP won 182 out of 275 seats — the first single-party majority in Nepal since 1999.
